reviews.comment:
Mala experiencia en el full. Pase el viernes 17 feb tipo medio día. La que me atendió no me hizo descuento socio ACA. Mintió y dijo que le pregunto a mi señora y que ahora había que cargar todo devuelta, de mala gana se negó a cargar el café en vaso termico de viajero (un compañero dijo "to lo hago" asiq ue ahí zafamos)

(Translated by Google)
Bad experience at the full. I stopped by on Friday, February 17th, around half a day. The person who helped me didn't give me an ACA member discount. She lied and said she'd asked my wife and that everything would have to be charged back. She reluctantly refused to charge the coffee in a travel mug (a colleague said, "I'll do it," so we got away with it).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoOWRQSTdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargué nafta. Cómoda y práctica. Precio del cafe muy alto y a la madrugada (tipo 6) no pudimos cargar agua para el termo pq la cafeteria estaba cerrada y los playeros no tenian fichitas. Una tristeza, viajar sin mate es como Batman sin Robin; como lluvia sin paraguas y como show de Coldplay sin pulsera de luces.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with gas. Comfortable and practical. The coffee was very expensive, and in the early morning (around 6 am) we couldn't get water for the thermos because the cafeteria was closed and the attendants didn't have any tokens. It's a shame; traveling without mate is like Batman without Robin, like rain without an umbrella, and like a Coldplay concert without a light-up wristband.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocFpUX19nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala la atencion , Viernes 17/02/2023 el turno que deja a las 6 de la mañana nos dejo plantados 20 min , por cambio de turno,  nunca nos habia pasado

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible. On Friday, February 17, 2023, the shift that started at 6 a.m. stood us up for 20 minutes due to a shift change. This has never happened to us before.
